paper.title_en: Einstein--Gauss--Bonnet Inflationary Cosmology in Phase-$θ$ Formalism
paper.abstract_en: A central challenge in testing inflationary scenarios with cosmic microwave background (CMB) data is to derive predictions for cosmological observables that remain accurate beyond the slow-roll regime, where the standard consistency relations are no longer applicable. We address this issue in the context of Einstein--Gauss--Bonnet (EGB) gravity by introducing a phase-$θ$ parametrization of the inflationary dynamics. Within this framework, the background evolution and the coefficients governing scalar and tensor perturbations are expressed entirely in terms of a single monotonic phase variable and the Hubble parameter. This construction provides a closed, analytical mapping between the background parameters of a given model and the associated inflationary observables. A notable advantage of the proposed parametrization is that it remains regular throughout the inflationary epoch, including the end-of-inflation regime, in which the conventional slow-roll consistency relations no longer hold. As an illustrative application, we consider a Starobinsky-type potential supplemented by a linear coupling between the inflaton and the Gauss--Bonnet invariant. Using the proposed formalism, we demonstrate that the resulting predictions of the Starobinsky model are consistent with the most recent constraints from ACT DR6 and BICEP/Keck, explicitly incorporating the impact of the non-minimal Gauss--Bonnet coupling on the expected values of the cosmological perturbation parameters. Finally, we compute the corresponding relic stochastic gravitational-wave background and evaluate its detectability with current and forthcoming gravitational-wave observatories.

decision.selection_reason_zh: 该论文提出了相-θ形式主义来精确计算爱因斯坦-高斯-博内引力中的暴胀可观测量，超越了慢滚近似，并与最新的CMB和引力波数据进行了比较。内容与PTA课题高度相关。
decision.title_zh: 相-θ形式主义下的爱因斯坦-高斯-博内暴胀宇宙学
decision.abstract_zh: 利用宇宙微波背景（CMB）数据检验暴胀情景的一个核心挑战是推导出在慢滚区域之外依然准确的对宇宙学可观测量的预测，而在慢滚区域之外，标准的一致性关系不再适用。我们在爱因斯坦-高斯-博内（EGB）引力的背景下通过引入暴胀动力学的相-θ参数化来解决这个问题。在这个框架内，背景演化以及标量和张量扰动的系数完全用单个单调相变量和哈勃参数表示。这一构造提供了一个封闭的解析映射，将给定模型的背景参数与相关的暴胀可观测量联系起来。所提出的参数化的一个显著优点是它在整个暴胀时期（包括暴胀结束阶段）保持正则，而在暴胀结束阶段，传统的慢滚一致性关系不再成立。作为一个说明性应用，我们考虑了一个Starobinsky型势，并补充了暴胀子与高斯-博内不变量之间的线性耦合。利用所提出的形式主义，我们证明了Starobinsky模型得到的预测与ACT DR6和BICEP/Keck的最新约束一致，明确地包含了非最小高斯-博内耦合对宇宙学扰动参数期望值的影响。最后，我们计算了相应的遗迹随机引力波背景，并评估了当前和即将建成的引力波观测站对其进行探测的可能性。
keywords_zh: 爱因斯坦-高斯-博内引力
